name: medisync-agents-platform
description: MediSync Agenten-Plattform - Eine vollständige Multi-Agent Platform mit Discord Bot, Dashboard und API

scripts.install:services: cd backend && npm install && cd ../bot/discord && npm install && cd ../../dashboard && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:bot" "npm run dev:dashboard" --names 'API,BOT,DASH' --prefix-colors 'blue,cyan,magenta'
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:bot" "npm run dev:dashboard" --names 'API,BOT,DASH' --prefix-colors 'blue,cyan,magenta'
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:bot" "npm run start:dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:bot && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:extension
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:bot && npm run test:extension
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && echo '🧪 Backend Tests werden ausgeführt...'
scripts.test:bot: cd bot/discord && echo '🧪 Bot Tests werden ausgeführt...'
scripts.test:extension: cd code-server/extensions/medical-ai-extension && echo '🧪 Extension Tests werden ausgeführt...'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:bot && npm run lint:dashboard
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../bot/discord && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../../dashboard && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.clean: npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:bot && npm run clean:dashboard && npm run clean:extension && rm -rf node_modules

author: MediSync Team
